title: Tavern
description: The innkeeper asks for help dealing with goblins in the nearby forest.
objective: Accept the quest to begin the adventure.

title: Forest Road
description: Goblin tracks lead into the woods.

title: Traveling Merchant
description: A merchant offers supplies before the final battle.
objective: Spend your gold or continue to the boss.

title: Goblin Camp
description: The Goblin Chief emerges from the shadows.

title: Adventure Complete
description: The goblin threat is ended and the road is safe again.
objective: Review the results and return to the lobby.
